{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320162849A8E0057BF70BE225B9AC"}"},"total":319},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594290008833262361","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"《半小时漫画中国史》堪称历史科普的“破壁者”，它以极简的漫画线条勾勒历史人物，用接地气的段子拆解王朝更迭，把复杂的历史脉络转化成清晰的时间轴。
没有枯燥的史料堆砌，没有晦涩的学术解读，从春秋战国的群雄逐鹿到明清的盛衰起落，作者总能抓住关键节点与人物特质，让读者在哈哈大笑中记住历史事件的前因后果。
这本书不是严肃的正史考据，却是绝佳的历史入门读物，它打破了历史与大众之间的壁垒，让原本厚重的历史变得轻盈好读，尤其适合想快速搭建中国史框架、又怕啃大部头史书的读者。","text_exts":[{"e":97,"s":93,"text":"春秋战国","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%98%A5%E7%A7%8B%E6%88%98%E5%9B%BD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773995329E225B9AC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227594290008833262361%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227008478016145722404%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%98%A5%E7%A7%8B%E6%88%98%E5%9B%BD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768187242,"group_id":"7008478016145722404","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"快乐小神仙","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyyqVZWC9QTrE4r9vOTIGUFg8PgvjLJlSttOLaKBYypm","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/73f479f7defc4179bf649a2b7991bb5e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535800&x-signature=oFtC5J9AsO9OnQ4HHmPc%2BA4XmKQ%3D","user_id":"3030704911295582","user_name":"菌子坐而论道"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3030704911295582","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7008478016145722404","book_info":{"abstract":"看半小时漫画,通古今中外历史!其实是严谨的极简中国史+极简世界史。从春秋战国到宋元明清,从四大文明古国到欧洲、日本、美国.....翻开本书,在笑出腹肌的同时通晓历史。
《半小时漫画中国史1-5》:春秋战国像个班级;大秦过把瘾就死;楚汉之争八卦多;三国就三大战役;大唐盛世开门红;两宋繁荣特有钱;元朝皇帝换得快;大明皇大多逃不开斗外敌、斗奸臣、平内乱三件事;清朝皇帝非常努力,但挡不住世界改革的浪潮......
《半小时漫画世界史1-2》:简到崩溃的极简欧洲史、美国往事三部曲、一口气就能读完的日本史。四大文明古国组团出道,为啥只剩中国屹立不倒?翻开本书,在铺天盖地的段子中,看懂另外三大文明古国的前世今生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/21d8ae72d9c3ee0088140062f5547fda~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"陈磊·半小时漫画团队","author_id":"","book_id":"7008478016145722404","book_name":"半小时漫画中国史（全七册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d03838","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"61.2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":402,"name":"中国历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402&name=中国历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586890096515746878","read_count":"3406","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"205939"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"94","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/21d8ae72d9c3ee0088140062f5547fda~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179329&x-signature=vPUgWGpG46FWllYexhnxRMPvGPQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320162849A8E0057BF70BE225B9AC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":5913,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":219},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7431376709759828798","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大，把历史用这种方式让他们鲜活起来了，看着看着直接上瘾了，本来对历史没有那么感兴趣的，虽然不是详细的那种但是也引导我想深入了解就等这个看完然后继续深扒了[爱慕][爱慕]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730259383,"group_id":"7008478016145722404","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"创作灵感来源于异想天开与生活的虚实结合","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwVdCQxQFGabAMD3Af5Ha48=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"778907044545214","user_name":"羽彬彬"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"778907044545214","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7008478016145722404","book_info":{"abstract":"看半小时漫画,通古今中外历史!其实是严谨的极简中国史+极简世界史。从春秋战国到宋元明清,从四大文明古国到欧洲、日本、美国.....翻开本书,在笑出腹肌的同时通晓历史。
《半小时漫画中国史1-5》:春秋战国像个班级;大秦过把瘾就死;楚汉之争八卦多;三国就三大战役;大唐盛世开门红;两宋繁荣特有钱;元朝皇帝换得快;大明皇大多逃不开斗外敌、斗奸臣、平内乱三件事;清朝皇帝非常努力,但挡不住世界改革的浪潮......
《半小时漫画世界史1-2》:简到崩溃的极简欧洲史、美国往事三部曲、一口气就能读完的日本史。四大文明古国组团出道,为啥只剩中国屹立不倒?翻开本书,在铺天盖地的段子中,看懂另外三大文明古国的前世今生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/21d8ae72d9c3ee0088140062f5547fda~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"陈磊·半小时漫画团队","author_id":"","book_id":"7008478016145722404","book_name":"半小时漫画中国史（全七册）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d03838","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"61.2万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":402,"name":"中国历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=402&name=中国历史&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7586890096515746878","read_count":"3406","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"205939"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.6","serial_count":"94","tags":"历史,中国历史","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/21d8ae72d9c3ee0088140062f5547fda~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179329&x-signature=vPUgWGpG46FWllYexhnxRMPvGPQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320162849A8E0057BF70BE225B9AC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":42,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":40396,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1163},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7179444907366138661","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好，会再来刷的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671594894,"group_id":"7  可读性强，历史小白可以从这书提升自己对历史的兴趣，再去看那些更复杂的史书会更好！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1670209858,"group_id":"7008478016145722404","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N06kZUQCeLd0GBOHOBXauhI=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/23b14da1ea5d4ec9ad3601982f622df4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776533733&x-signature=O1TK6SoPXKCUvyvfpnneDmJJMSI%3D","user_id":"4118728082","user_name":"李大锅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4118728082","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7008478016145722404","book_info":{"abstract":"看半小时漫画,通古今中外历史!其实是严谨的极简中国史+极简世界史。从春秋战国到宋元明清,从四大文明古国到欧洲、日本、美国.....翻开本书,在笑出腹肌的同时通晓历史。
